title: iris nicolai
intro: Iris nicolai, also known as the crested iris, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is a perennial plant with beautiful, crested flowers in shades of blue and purple, commonly found in mountainous regions of the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to have various health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and treating wounds and infections. Iris nicolai can be prepared as a tincture, decoction, or salve, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its full potential as a medicinal plant.
